other_observers: Larry Semo, Alex Brown, Gillian Brown, Harry Price; Harry Price originally found the bird the evening of May 6. The bird was not seen after May 9.
specific_location: Backyard of a private residence owned by Harry Price.
description: Boldly patterned passerina bunting. The head was entirely blue, except for the red chin/throat and red orbital ring; the underparts were solidly bright red as was the rump; the remaining upperparts were a bright green; both the wings and tail looked to be a very worn brown with only traces of red along the lengths of the rectrices and remiges (hence the consideration of third year plumage); the bill was stout and short, coming to a blunt point, and entirely dark.Behaviors: Observed feeding at a seed feeder in a suburban backyard.Call: None heard.Plumage: adult possibly third year
